arts.ttl: John Heitinga agent speaks out on West Brom opportunity and chance of leaving Liverpool
arts.sum: John Heitinga arrived at Liverpool in the summer to become a key part of Arne Slot’s backroom team at Liverpool. With Slot facing the big task of replacing Jurgen Klopp, he worked to add to his usual backroom team and Heitinga was the man chosen. arts.ttl: Luke Williams says sorry to Swansea City fans and makes feelings clear on West Brom job
arts.sum: The Swans boss has finally dismissed speculation linking him with the vacancy at West Brom

arts.ttl: West Brom next manager latest as Luke Williams speaks out on 'absurd' links
arts.sum: The ex-Swindon boss will come up against interim triumvirate Chris Brunt, Damia Abella and Boaz Myhill on the touch-line in South Wales, as Albion's hierarchy - led by sporting director Andrew Nestor - continue their hunt for Corberan's successor away from the action on the field of play. Clearly, it's not going to be Williams' silhouette which next emerges on the Hawthorns' touch-line.

arts.ttl: Lewis Dobbin makes admission after leaving West Brom and making another Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Lewis Dobbin admits that the first half of the season at West Bromwich Albion didn't pan out as he had hoped after he left The Hawthorns to move to Championship rivals Norwich City. Norwich City sporting director Ben Knapper added: “We’re really pleased to add Lewis to our group and we’re excited to work with him for the remainder of the season.

Aston Villa can confirm Lewis Dobbin has returned from his loan at West Bromwich Albion and will immediately join Norwich City until the end of the season. The forward made 18 appearances in all competitions for the Baggies this term and heads to Carrow Road for the remainder of the campaign. Dobbin signed for Villa from Everton in the summer, featuring during the club’s pre-season tour of the United States.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Kieran Tierney to Celtic, Josh Maja to Bournemouth, Umar Sadiq to Valencia
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Kieran Tierney to Celtic, Josh Maja to Bournemouth and Umar Sadiq to Valencia.

arts.ttl: Luke Williams holds talks with Swansea City hierarchy as West Brom speculation swirls
arts.sum: The Swans boss now looks set to stay, despite speculation linking him with the vacant West Bromwich Albion job

arts.ttl: From Spain: Carlos Corberán now set for ‘baptism of fire’ after West Brom exit
arts.sum: West Bromwich Albion currently find themselves sixth in the Championship and looking to battle to get to the Premier League. They’re without a permanent manager, with Chris Brunt doing pretty well on an interim basis and they’re seemingly being no candidate standing out above all others.
